task_completion.description: Navigate to the Leave module in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Leave' tab or menu item is highlighted or selected in the main navigation bar.

task_completion.description: Open the Leave Period configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Leave Period' settings page is visible, typically accessed via Leave -> Configure -> Leave Period. The page should display fields for 'Start Month' and 'Start Date'.

task_completion.description: Set the Start Month to April.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Start Month' dropdown menu displays 'April' as the selected value.

task_completion.description: Set the Start Date to the 1st of the month.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Start Date' dropdown menu displays '1' or '01' as the selected value.

task_completion.description: Save the new Leave Period configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Successfully Saved' toast message) is visible on the screen, or the page shows the saved, non-editable state with April 1st as the configured start date.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure the setting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the OrangeHRM web interface, not terminal commands or a database client directly modifying the 'hs_hr_config' table.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open or being used to alter the HTML text of the dropdowns or success messages.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than a text editor or mock.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the standard OrangeHRM interface with proper styling, menus, and layout, rather than text pasted into a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target leave period start date is April 1st. The VLM should verify that 'April' (Month 4) and '1' or '01' (Day 1) are selected in the Leave Period configuration settings of the OrangeHRM web interface.
